definitions.text: Conforming to the actual state of reality or fact; factually correct.
examples: True, I have only read part of the book, but I like it so far.

definitions.text: As an ellipsis of "(while) it is true (that)", used to start a sentence
examples: True, I have only read part of the book, but I like it so far.

definitions.text: The state of being in alignment.
To straighten (something that is supposed to be straight).
examples: He trued the spokes of the bicycle wheel.

definitions.text: To make even, level, symmetrical, or accurate, align; adjust (often followed by up).
examples: We spent all night truing up the report.
